body: This PR makes an extension for ClimaAtmos which involves moving all the files in `experiments/ClimaEarth/components/atmosphere` to ext.
title: Add ClimaCouplerClimaAtmosExt extension

body:
This PR moves `CalibrateConfig` to `CalibrationTools` and removes `api.jl` from the calibration directory.

This PR also add checks for whether the G ensemble matrix is completed and for sequential indices when filling out the G ensemble matrix. Without the first check, the G ensemble matrix could be filled with uninitialized values. Without the second one, incorrect data would be used to fill out the G ensemble matrix if the period of reductions are not the same (see `Checker.check` for `SequentialIndicesChecker` in [ClimaCalibrate docs](https://clima.github.io/ClimaCalibrate.jl/dev/api/#ClimaCalibrate.Checker.check)). 

This is another step towards https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCoupler.jl/issues/1691.
title: Move CalibrateConfig to CalibrationTools
